message:
🐛 Fix demo mode for cached data hooks (#442)

Add getDemoMode() check at the start of fetchers in useCachedData.ts
to ensure demo data is returned immediately when demo mode is enabled,
regardless of whether the user has a real JWT token.

This fixes an issue where stats would show "-" values because the
fetcher would try API calls before falling back to demo data.

Changes:
- Add demo mode check to useCachedDeployments fetcher
- Add demo mode check to useCachedPodIssues fetcher
- Add demo mode check to useCachedDeploymentIssues fetcher
- Add demo mode check to useCachedProwJobs fetcher
- Add demo mode check to useCachedLLMdServers fetcher
- Add demo mode check to useCachedLLMdModels fetcher
- Expand getDemoDeployments() to return 12 diverse deployments

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
